'''Dall Thara Dru''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Raxxa]].

==Biography==
During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], she was Chair of the [[Commerce Council]], and was the only female member of the [[New Republic Ruling Council|Ruling Council]] at the time. She supported [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] when [[Doman Beruss (Illodian)|Doman Beruss]] submitted a [[Vote of No Confidence/Legends|Vote of No Confidence]] against her, but this was mostly because she believed [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and the [[New Jedi Order]] were planning to intervene on the side of the New Republic.

{{Char-stub}}
